meaning: n.(水管、煤气管等的)入口,进口,通风口,(在一定期间的)引入的量
examples: Your intake of alcohol should not exceed two units per day.
Salt intake may lead to raised blood pressure in susceptible adults.
Nutritionists say only 33 percent of our calorie intake should be from fat.
But he admits that people should stick to reduced-fat hamburger, and limit their egg intake.
Another great way to differentiate your intake is to change the media you consume.
